courseleaf.title: Mathematics, Master of Arts
courseleaf.informationtext:
Graduate Study

The Mathematics Department offers programs of study and research leading to M.A. and Ph.D. degrees in Mathematics. Information regarding graduate study may be obtained by consulting Graduate Information, and by sending an email to Graduate Program Coordinator.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Mathematics.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: The graduate program offers a diverse set of research programs. Ample student support is available from a variety of sources. The program is small enough to provide students with the personal attention necessary to meet their desired goal. However, the program also offers the advantages of a large graduate program, such as a broad choice of graduate courses, research areas, potential dissertation supervisors, major library resources, computer facilities, and support. Ample student support is available from a variety of sources.
